import httpx, os, json
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

api_key = os.getenv\('ALPACA_BROKER_API_KEY'\)
secret_key = os.getenv\('ALPACA_BROKER_SECRET_KEY'\)
acct_id = 'd27aa8c2-5931-499b-bdfa-05c47b07ad70'
base = 'https://broker-api.sandbox.alpaca.markets'
auth = httpx.BasicAuth\(api_key, secret_key\)

# Dump all keys on both endpoints
r = httpx.get\(f'{base}/v1/accounts/{acct_id}', auth=auth\)
print\('Account keys:', list\(r.json\(\).keys\(\)\)\)

r2 = httpx.get\(f'{base}/v1/trading/accounts/{acct_id}/account', auth=auth\)
print\('Trading account keys:', list\(r2.json\(\).keys\(\)\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(source .venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=. python -c "
import httpx, os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
load_dotenv\(\)

api_key = os.getenv\('ALPACA_BROKER_API_KEY'\)
secret_key = os.getenv\('ALPACA_BROKER_SECRET_KEY'\)
base = 'https://broker-api.sandbox.alpaca.markets'
auth = httpx.BasicAuth\(api_key, secret_key\)

now = '2026-02-23T19:00:00Z'
payload = {
    'contact': {
        'email_address': 'options_test4@prophitai.com',
        'phone_number': '5559876543',
        'street_address': ['456 Options Blvd'],
        'city': 'New York',
        'state': 'NY',
        'postal_code': '10001',
        'country': 'USA',
    },
    'identity': {
        'given_name': 'Options',
        'family_name': 'TestUser',
        'date_of_birth': '1990-01-15',
        'tax_id': '666-55-4324',
        'tax_id_type': 'USA_SSN',
        'country_of_citizenship': 'USA',
        'country_of_birth': 'USA',
        'country_of_tax_residence': 'USA',
        'funding_source': ['employment_income'],
        'annual_income_min': '100000',
        'annual_income_max': '200000',
        'liquid_net_worth_min': '100000',
        'liquid_net_worth_max': '500000',
        'total_net_worth_min': '200000',
        'total_net_worth_max': '1000000',
        'liquidity_needs': 'NOT_IMPORTANT',
        'investment_experience_with_stocks_bonds': 'EXPERIENCED',
        'investment_experience_with_options': 'EXPERIENCED',
        'risk_tolerance': 'MODERATE',
        'investment_objective': 'GROWTH',
        'investment_time_horizon': 'LONG',
        'marital_status': 'SINGLE',
        'number_of_dependents': 0,
    },
    'disclosures': {
        'is_control_person': False,
        'is_affiliated_exchange_or_finra': False,
        'is_politically_exposed': False,
        'immediate_family_exposed': False,
    },
    'agreements': [
        {'agreement': 'account_agreement', 'signed_at': now, 'ip_address': '127.0.0.1'},
        {'agreement': 'customer_agreement', 'signed_at': now, 'ip_address': '127.0.0.1'},
        {'agreement': 'margin_agreement', 'signed_at': now, 'ip_address': '127.0.0.1'},
        {'agreement': 'options_agreement', 'signed_at': now, 'ip_address': '127.0.0.1'},
    ],
    'enabled_assets': ['us_equity', 'us_option'],
}

r = httpx.post\(f'{base}/v1/accounts', json=payload, auth=auth\)
print\(f'Status: {r.status_code}'\)
data = r.json\(\)
if r.status_code < 300:
    print\(f'account_id: {data.get\(\\"id\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'status: {data.get\(\\"status\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'enabled_assets: {data.get\(\\"enabled_assets\\"\)}'\)
    print\(f'agreements: {[a[\\"agreement\\"] for a in data.get\(\\"agreements\\", []\)]}'\)
else:
    print\(data\)
" 2>&1)
